HEARING RE: Defendants NODE LABS INC., COMPOUND GENETICS LLC, FELIPE RECALDE and LAUREN AVENIUS' Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Declarations Of Dan Adler Golden Evan Tenenbaum And Kieran Ringgenberg Proof Of Service.

Appearances (via Zoom):

James Urbanic, Esq., URBANIC & ASSOCIATES, INC., (310) 216-0900, for Plaintiff.

Kieran Ringgenberg, Esq., FEUERSTEIN KULICK LLP, (510) 775-7000, for Defendants.

Ruling - A R G U E D. Upon conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order and consequent judgment.
